description: Diagnostic angiography of right internal carotid artery
rationale: The note documents selective catheterization and digital subtraction imaging of the right internal carotid artery as a distinct diagnostic procedure. The interpretation section details the findings for the 'RIGHT INTERNAL CAROTID ARTERY INJECTION'.
official_description: CPT code 36223 is used for placing a catheter in the carotid or innominate artery for diagnostic imaging or intervention purposes.
